author: sling/refinery
text: Root cause identified: The agent bead exists as 'sl-sling-refinery' but await-event was called with '--agent-bead gt-sling-refinery' (wrong ID). Fix: use '--agent-bead sl-sling-refinery' in the patrol. Confirmed working - idle:6 correctly triggered 5m backoff. The patrol molecule template needs updating to use 'sl-sling-refinery' as the agent bead ID.
